name: Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Melt butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir until blended and set aside to cool.
3. Beat eggs until light yellow; add salt, sugar, flour, and baking powder. Beat well.
4. Blend in the cooled chocolate, vanilla, and pecans. Mix thoroughly.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake 35-45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool before cutting.
